{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.3": 2, "R1.4": 2, "R1.7": 3, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.3": "The critique flags potential issues with claim-evidence linkage but doesn't provide specific examples or analysis.", "R1.4": "Identifies prior work but lacks a detailed comparison of the proposed method to existing approaches.", "R1.7": "Mentions missing citations and factual errors, demonstrating some engagement with scholarly rigor.", "RX.1": "Fails to explicitly state uncertainties or areas where the critique might be incomplete.", "RX.3": "Mostly stays within the requested scope of critiquing the intro/related work section.", "RX.4": "The critique does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.", "RX.5": "Doesn't provide specific source attributions for the claims made in the critique."},
  "confidence": {"R1.3": 0.7, "R1.4": 0.6, "R1.7": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.5, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The critique flags potential issues with claim-evidence linkage but doesn't provide specific examples or analysis.
rationale.R1.4: Identifies prior work but lacks a detailed comparison of the proposed method to existing approaches.
rationale.R1.7: Mentions missing citations and factual errors, demonstrating some engagement with scholarly rigor.
rationale.RX.1: Fails to explicitly state uncertainties or areas where the critique might be incomplete.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly stays within the requested scope of critiquing the intro/related work section.
rationale.RX.4: The critique does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't provide specific source attributions for the claims made in the critique.
